conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt a deep connection with I, as we both prioritized cooperation and shared specific goals like clearing debts and helping family members. J also became a close ally after we bonded over our shared motivation to provide a safety net for our loved ones and agreed to look out for each other. I also appreciated B's strategic mindset, as we both agreed that a solid alliance would be key to navigating this game safely. Although we share similar motivations, I felt the least connected to D, whose responses were much more brief and focused solely on getting the game started quickly.

I have formed explicit pacts with I and J to watch each other's backs and prioritize mutual success. I trust I the most because of our clear alignment on strategy, but I am also inclined to trust J given our shared commitment to our families. I don't have a reason to distrust anyone specifically yet, but I will be staying observant to see who honors their word once the stakes get higher.
